specific_mechanism: ZQ-noise: simultaneous bit-flip and phase-flip decoherence channel acts on a qubit producing a Y-error; topologically protected codes route ZQ-string operators around defects
llm_application: LLM activation decoherence: simultaneous magnitude and phase corruption of latent vectors as a ZQ-error; topologically protected attention routes information around defects.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes ZQ-noise-decoherence topological-defect mapping as proposed.
